allow: Bash(node -e "const ical = require\('ical-generator'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ical\)\); const cal = ical.default\({name:'test'}\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(cal\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {teamPage} = require\('./views/team'\); const html = teamPage\({name:'City FC', slug:'city-fc', tier:'standard', theme:'light'}, [{uid:'a',summary:'City FC vs United',home_team:'City FC',away_team:'United AFC',is_home:true,start_time:'2026-06-14T15:00:00Z',end_time:'2026-06-14T17:00:00Z',location:'Riverside',description:'League Cup',status:'active',fixture_type:'cup'},{uid:'b',summary:'X vs City FC',home_team:'X Town',away_team:'City FC',is_home:false,start_time:'2026-07-01T10:30:00Z',end_time:'2026-07-01T12:00:00Z',location:null,description:null,status:'active',fixture_type:'league'},{uid:'c',summary:'Old vs City FC',home_team:'Old Boys',away_team:'City FC',is_home:false,start_time:'2026-05-01T10:30:00Z',end_time:'2026-05-01T12:00:00Z',location:null,description:null,status:'cancelled_shown',fixture_type:'festival'}], 'https://x.test/calendar/city-fc.ics', null, null, false\); console.log\('render OK, length', html.length\); if\(!html.includes\('date-tab'\)\) throw new Error\('missing date-tab'\); if\(!html.includes\('THU 14 JUN'\)&&!html.includes\('SUN 14 JUN'\)&&!html.includes\('14 JUN'\)\) throw new Error\('missing date tab text'\);")
